validation.sourceNotes: Initial list extracted manually from local-text/asuncion-fancy-buildings.md into this JSON. The page does not import or parse the Markdown file.
validation.addressSource: Google Maps Places text search using the private Maps key from .env on 2026-06-30, with the first matching residential/project result retained.
validation.availabilitySource: BrightData Google batches, regular web search and targeted source review on 2026-06-30.
validation.localRentalAdSource: Representative direct rental, temporary-rental, short-term rental or Airbnb pages. Generic search result pages, sale-only pages and developer pages are not used as sufficient rental evidence.
validation.longTermRentSource: Monthly USD rent estimates target a furnished 1-bedroom benchmark. Direct 1-bedroom listings are used when available; 2-bedroom and larger-unit evidence is normalized down to a 1-bedroom-equivalent estimate.
validation.airbnbRule: Airbnb is marked confirmed only when a search result explicitly named the building or exact address. Generic neighborhood Airbnb results are ignored.
validation.includedRule: Buildings come from the local Asunción fancy-buildings list plus a follow-up audit for pool, gym, active rental evidence and post-2010 delivery/renovation. Entries were retained when search found either a direct rental page, a short-term rental page or clear current project/rental evidence.
validation.lastExpansion: On 2026-06-30, nine additional Asunción buildings were added after BrightData and regular search found pool/gym evidence, active rentals, and post-2010 construction evidence: Life Mariscal, Ancora, Edificio Espíritu Santo, Habitalis Mburucuyá, Torre Augusta I, Life Bruselas, Life Villa Morra, Civis Alpha and Lomas 1820.
validation.floorCountSource: Floor counts use official/developer pages or listing snippets from BrightData/regular search. Null means no reliable total floor count was found during this pass.
validation.lastTwoBedroomAreaAudit: On 2026-07-01, Asuncion buildings with stored 2-bedroom estimates of 133 m2 or higher were rechecked against additional sale-listing search results. Representative estimates were adjusted where repeated listing evidence showed a better apartment-area figure; entries already supported by direct 2-bedroom evidence were left unchanged.
